name: extract-errors
tagline: Runs `yarn extract-errors` and reports on React error codes that need IDs assigned.
verdict: Tiny, safe utility skill with zero security exposure. But it's underspecified for a 3-line procedure: the two interpretation steps ('report if needed', 'check if up to date') give no criteria for making that call, there's no defined output shape for the report, no guidance if `yarn extract-errors` isn't available or fails, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Steps 2-3 ('Report if any new errors need codes assigned', 'Check if error codes are up to date', lines 11-12) give no criteria for the decision.
'Report if any new errors need codes assigned' (line 11) has no defined output format or fields.
Invokes `yarn extract-errors` (line 10) with no requirements note or availability check.
